content.problemStatement:
For an integer KKK and a permutation A=[A1,A2,…,AN]A = [A_1, A_2, \dots, A_N]A=[A1​,A2​,…,AN​] of values from 111 to NNN, we define a function f(A)f(A)f(A) that returns the number of pairs of integers (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) such that


1≤i<j≤N1 \le i \lt j \le N1≤i<j≤N
j>i+Kj \gt i+Kj>i+K
Aj>AiA_j \gt A_iAj​>Ai​
For all x≥(i+1)x \geq (i+1)x≥(i+1) and x≤(j−1)x\leq(j-1)x≤(j−1) , Ax<AiA_x \lt A_iAx​<Ai​
for all x<ix \lt ix<i , Ax<AiA_x \lt A_iAx​<Ai​
In simple words, in the subarray A[1..j]A_{[1..j]}A[1..j]​, AiA_iAi​ is the second-largest element and AjA_jAj​ is the
largest element.

You are given KKK. Calculate ∑f(A)\sum f(A)∑f(A) for ALL permutations AAA of size NNN.

Since the answer can be very large, find the sum over modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of T test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two integers NNN and KKK.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single line containing one integer - the sum of f(P)f(P)f(P) for
all permutation of size NNN for the given KKK.
constraints: **Subtask 2 (30 points):** Sum of N over all test cases does not exceed 10710^7107.
